item.title: 50-Car Journey Explained
item.description: A look back at a journey through 50 cars, sharing experiences, repairs, and lessons learned from working on a wide range of vehicles.

media:content.media:title: 50-Car Journey Explained
media:content.media:description: A look back at a journey through 50 cars, sharing experiences, repairs, and lessons learned from working on a wide range of vehicles.

item.title: Chevy Durango Find
item.description: A Chevy Durango is discovered and evaluated, showing inspection details, condition checks, and initial thoughts on the vehicle’s state and value.

media:content.media:title: Chevy Durango Find
media:content.media:description: A Chevy Durango is discovered and evaluated, showing inspection details, condition checks, and initial thoughts on the vehicle’s state and value.

item.title: Tracking a Battery Draw Issue
item.description: A parasitic battery drain is diagnosed, showing step-by-step electrical troubleshooting to find the source of power loss in a vehicle.

media:content.media:title: Tracking a Battery Draw Issue
media:content.media:description: A parasitic battery drain is diagnosed, showing step-by-step electrical troubleshooting to find the source of power loss in a vehicle.

item.title: Porsche Macan Noise Diagnosis
item.description: A Porsche Macan is inspected for unusual noise, showing diagnostic steps, mechanical checks, and identifying the source of the issue.

media:content.media:title: Porsche Macan Noise Diagnosis
media:content.media:description: A Porsche Macan is inspected for unusual noise, showing diagnostic steps, mechanical checks, and identifying the source of the issue.

item.description: A breakdown of key engine and transmission maintenance tips, covering common issues, diagnostics, and how to keep vehicles running smoothly.

item.description: A truck is inspected to assess condition, value, and performance, showing key areas to check before deciding on purchase or repair.
